```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement ML model versioning and registry"
---
# Model Registry
## Task
Set up ML model versioning and registry.
## Requirements
1. Register models with version, metrics, and metadata. 2. Support model stages (dev, staging, production).
3. Track model lineage (data, code, parameters). 4. Support model comparison and promotion.
5. Implement model rollback.
## Constraints
- Every production model must be registered. Include training data version. Support rollback.
## Success Criteria
- Models versioned and staged. Lineage tracked. Promotion and rollback work.
```
